title: Choose a Default Component Implementation
text: Choose a Default Component Implementation If a component has multiple implementations, you can specify a default implementation. At runtime, the default implementation is executed, unless the [SERVICES_EXEC] section of the usys.asn file specifies that another implementation should be used. To specify a default implementation, in the Signature Editor. click >> next to the Implementations field, and select the implementation to use as the default. Related Links Component Implementations The component signature specifies the implementation a component, which determines the technology used to deploy it, such as Uniface, C, or Java.
